parameters.jsonBody: ={"q": "SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM tokens WHERE first_seen::date = CURRENT_DATE"}
={"q": "SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ohlcv_data WHERE timestamp::date = CURRENT_DATE"}

={"q": "SELECT 'tokens' AS tabla, COUNT(*) AS total FROM tokens UNION ALL SELECT 'ohlcv_data', COUNT(*) FROM ohlcv_data UNION ALL SELECT 'features', COUNT(*) FROM features UNION ALL SELECT 'labels', COUNT(*) FROM labels UNION ALL SELECT 'scores', COUNT(*) FROM scores"}
